meaning: n.马形水鬼(苏格兰民间传说中能诱人自溺或预告人们将溺死)
examples: He caught a kelpie, and tied her behind him on his horse.
No, you have become the river god, is no longer a Kelpie.
The world ' s biggest and most famous kelpie is the loch ness monster , although it is often mistaken for a sea serpent ( fb )
